user.title: Set up MLB Live Scoreboard
user.description: Choose an MLB team for this scoreboard instance.

error.invalid_team: The selected team is not valid.

init.title: Game Event Actions
init.description: Run any Home Assistant actions when game events occur. Each event also fires on the event bus (e.g. mlb_live_scoreboard_team_scored) with a payload you can use in templates as trigger.event.data.team_score, trigger.event.data.opponent_name, trigger.event.data.scoring_play_text, etc.
